text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, while on a stroll along the river, I notice a certain
runner out of the corner of my eye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Ah, good morning!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you bet! How could I not be when it's so nice outside?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could do laps forever in this weather. Anyway, I'll let you
get back to your walk! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our short exchange now over, Mejiro Ryan takes off. Her jog seems to
be more for fun than sport, but her form is still consistent. It's honestly
impressive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that thought is quickly replaced by another, more immediate
concern... Shouldn't she be headed to school?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right, right. I wanted to try out that new running routine! Better do
one... no, five more laps!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ah, it's you again... What's up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Late? For wha—aaah! School! I gotta go, and quick!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, thanks for the heads-up! It was so nice this morning, I totally
zoned out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, gotta run! Thanks again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan dashes off towards the school, once again displaying her
flawless running form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That same day, after classes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're the person from this morning!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that badge... Ah, that's how you knew I was running late! You're
a trainer here, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks again for the save! And don't worry, I made it to school in
time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'd like to pay you back somehow, but how... Ah, I know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, could you come with me for a second?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, we're finally here! As thanks for helping me this morning...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We're gonna work out together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You bet! As far as thanks go, this is probably the best I've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've always loved moving my body, you see. In fact, exercise might be
the only thing I'm good at.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But hey, that just makes me the best kind of coach—the kind that
shows you how fun workouts can be! I'll even come up with the
perfect routine for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Suddenly being asked to work out must be kinda strange, right?
Sorry, I can come up with something else if you like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My hesitation clearly has Mejiro Ryan feeling down. I decide to step
up.
choice_data_list: Well, this is certainly a rare opportunity...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! Awesome! In that case, let's get changed and pump some
iron!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew! How's that, Trainer?! Feelin' the burn yet?!
choice_data_list: Oh yeah... I'm feeling it, all right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't sweat it if you're having trouble keeping up! We've just
been waking up your muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, time for the real workout! Well hydrated?! Great! Let's get SWOLE!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's it! One more rep! One more! Hm? Can't keep going? Okay, just
one more to finish out the set and... Yeah! You did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Great job! Do you feel that, Trainer? I bet your heart, your
pectorals—your whole body's screaming out in gratitude!
choice_data_list: Y-yeah... You're right! I can hear them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Then let's scream back and show your body what it's made of!
On to the second round!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer... This is it! The final stretch! Come on! Count out the
reps with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: One!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Threeee! Woohoo! You did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exhaustion consumes me... but it's accompanied by a strong feeling of
accomplishment and pride! After all, that was one intense workout!
choice_data_list: Do you do this every day?
Do you do this every day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, today's workout was made with you in mind. I'd say I usually do...
about four times more in total.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But any exercise is good exercise as far as your muscles are
concerned! Keep it up, and you'll see results in no time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats seeing your time go down, even by a single second.
And when your hard work shows on the track... Man, that's something
entirely different!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That moment when you're the fastest on the track... when you cross
that finish line before anyone else...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Feeling your muscles burn and that heat spread throughout your
body... No better experience than that.
choice_data_list: Is that why you run? To feel that?
Is that why you run? To feel that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You bet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hope that's not... too disappointing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's reaction to my question is a bit perplexing, but before I can
continue, another Umamusume approaches her.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Where are yo—ah, there you are! Figures you'd be in the gym!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts are coming up, remember? I figured you'd be training for
that, so let's run together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really?! That'd be amazing! Wanna get started right now?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say yes! ♪ I'll go get changed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Guess I better get going too. Great work today—I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See ya 'round!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from that conversation, Mejiro Ryan's running in the tryouts...
Which means I'll be able to see how she runs at her best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With something to look forward to, I pack up and leave the gym with
a spring in my step. Or... I would if I wasn't so sore.
